narrative:
Strongsville-02-F (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 891 registered voters, with 50.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
